paragraphs.text: Stablecoin total supply reached $315.4B ATH. USDC maintained 25% market share vs USDT 58.4%, leaving a 16.6% addressable base (~$52B) for institutional alternatives like USDGO.
paragraphs.text_zh: 稳定币总供应量创历史新高 $315.4B。USDC 维持 25%市场份额，对比 USDT 58.4%，留下了 16.6%可寻址基础（~$52B）供 USDGO 等机构替代品进入。

paragraphs.text: STRATEGIC PRIORITY: US GENIUS Act breakthrough unlocks USDGO yield distribution compliance. HKMA registration window is live. Mastercard/BVNK acquisition compresses StableHub competitive window to 6-12 months — accelerate B2B pipeline.
paragraphs.text_zh: 战略优先项：美国 GENIUS Act 突破解锁 USDGO 收益分配合规路径。HKMA 注册窗口已开放。Mastercard/BVNK 收购将 StableHub 竞争窗口压缩至6-12个月——加速 B2B 管道。

paragraphs.text: P0 GAP: Customer Pain (Theme 2) has only 1 weak signal. Cannot confirm PMF without 30+ structured interviews. This is the research priority before any product investment decision.
paragraphs.text_zh: P0 缺口：客户痛点(主题2)仅有1条弱信号，无法在30+结构化访谈前确认PMF，这是任何产品投资决策前的研究优先项。
